pi_items.source: task.json description and verifier.py route name constraints

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated acoustic data using 'sox' due to the absence of the moonlight_sonata.wav file. The required track name 'Spell FX', the export file path '/home/ga/Audio/export/time_spell.wav', the alignment tolerance of 8820 samples, and the minimum fade length of 22050 samples are all explicitly confirmed by the task description instructions and the hardcoded constraints in the verifier.py logic.
